  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.openfeign.support used by org.springframework.cloud.openfeign
    Class
    Description
    AbstractFormWriter
     
    FeignHttpMessageConverters
    Class that mimics HttpMessageConverters and the default implementation there.
    PageJacksonModule
    This Jackson module provides support to deserialize Spring Page objects.
    SortJacksonModule
    This Jackson module provides support for serializing and deserializing for Spring Sort object.
